data.title: DeFi Borrowing Demand Plunges as Crypto Traders Deleverage Amid Market Turmoil
data.description:
• Borrowing demand in decentralized finance (DeFi) has significantly decreased due to recent crypto market turmoil, indicating widespread deleveraging.
  • The vaults.fyi U.S. dollar stablecoin rate, which measures the average yield paid to DeFi lenders, fell to 2.8%, its lowest reading in a year.
  • Major DeFi lending protocols like Aave and Morpho experienced a sharp decline in the value of borrowed assets over the past months, a sign of investors reducing risk, Ryan Rodenbaugh of Wallfacer Labs said.

data.title: Bitcoin's Resilience During Tariff Chaos Impresses Wall Street Firm Bernstein
data.description:
• The team at investment bank Bernstein is impressed with bitcoin's performance so far during the tariff difficulties.
  • Turning to the bitcoin miners, Bernstein said tariffs negatively impact U.S. supply chains and this could have implications for their share of the network hashrate, the report said.

data.title: Crypto Left Cold as Stocks Surge 3%; Bitcoin Slides Back to $78K
data.description:
• Stocks are flying higher Tuesday, but bitcoin is being left out of the rally.
  • Some positive headlines with respect to tariffs are helping fuel the move.
  • On a longer timeline, bitcoin is holding its own versus the tech-heavy U.S. Nasdaq.

data.title: CoinShares Head of Asset Management Frank Spiteri Has Left the Company: Sources
data.description:
• CoinShares head of asset management, Frank Spiteri, has left the business, according to people familiar with the event.
  • The company is currently recruiting, one person said.

data.title: Coinbase More Than Just Trading Platform, Its 'Mission-Critical' for Crypto, Cantor Says
data.description:
• Cantor initiated coverage of crypto exchange Coinbase with an overweight rating and a $245 price target.
  • Investors are not assigning enough value to the company's activities outside of crypto trading, the report said.
  • Coinbase's layer 2 blockchain Base gives the firm an edge, Cantor said.

data.title: Private Equity Giant Apollo Invests in Real-World Asset Platform Plume
data.description:
• Plume, a blockchain platform for real-world assets, received a "seven-figure" investment from funds managed by Apollo Global Management to expand its infrastructure.
  • The funding highlights growing institutional interest in tokenized assets, with Plume aiming to make alternative assets more liquid and programmable.

data.title: Centrifuge Taps Wormhole to Launch Multichain Tokenization Platform
data.description:
• Centrifuge V3 will let users manage tokenized assets across chains from a single interface.
  • The system is launching with a $230 million tokenized U.S. Treasury fund managed by Anemoy.
  • Wormhole will provide multichain infrastructure to support liquidity and composability.

data.title: Ex-Valkyrie CEO Leah Wald’s SOL Strategies Bought 24,000 SOL in March
data.description:
• SOL Strategies acquired 24,000 SOL in March.
  • The company’s shares have fallen 25% since early March, echoing SOL’s market performance.
  • SOL Strategies has expanded validator operations across Solana, Sui, Monad, and ARCH.

data.title: Ripple to Acquire Prime Broker Hidden Road for $1.25B, Expanding Institutional Push
data.description:
• Ripple has agreed to buy prime broker Hidden Road for $1.25 billion.
  • CoinDesk reported last week that Hidden Road was in takeover talks.

data.title: XRP Could Hit $12.5 Before President Trump's Term Ends: Standard Chartered
data.description:
• XRP could reach $12.50 by 2028 year-end, Standard Chartered said.
  • The bank said XRP is uniquely positioned at the heart of of cross-border payments.
  • XRP is expected to keep pace with bitcoin, in terms of price gains, the report said.
